mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE CommentTree AS ( SELECT id, post_id, user_id, parent_id, content, status, created_at, CAST(id AS CHAR(200)) AS path FROM comments WHERE parent_id IS NULL AND post_id = #{postId} UNION ALL SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.status, c.created_at, CONCAT(ct.path, '-', c.id) AS path FROM comments c INNER JOIN CommentTree ct ON c.parent_id = ct.id ) SELECT ct.*, u.login_id, /* ✅ 각 댓글 ID에 해당하는 좋아요 개수를 서브쿼리로 가져옵니다 */ (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reactions r WHERE r.target_type = 'COMMENT' AND r.target_id = ct.id) as likeCount FROM CommentTree ct JOIN users u ON ct.user_id = u.id ORDER BY path ASC, created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (post_id, user_id, parent_id, content) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{content})
